name: Wire Frame
description: Thin wireframe structures with skeletal simplicity

prompts.SessionStart: thin metallic wire tone ascending with bright precise vibration, wire string pluck, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SessionEnd: metallic wire tone descending with smooth precise decay, wire string sound, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.Stop: single thin wire pluck with bright precise metallic ring, wire string tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct wire tick with crisp thin metallic click, wire tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PostToolUse: short wire pluck confirming with bright thin metallic ping, wire string, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two thin wire tones with questioning rising metallic interval, wire string, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady wire vibration with clear rhythmic thin metallic pulse, wire tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStart: wire tone splitting into two diverging thin metallic voices, wire sound, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStop: clear wire ping returning with distinct thin metallic ring, wire tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic wire pluck burst with rapid thin metallic attack, wire string tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
